title: Template Store
subtitle: Install official preset images to quickly create sandbox templates.

installModal.subtitle: Install as Cube Template
installModal.timeout: Timeout. Check template list for status.

toast.upToDate: All images are up to date

sandbox-code.name: Code Execution Sandbox
sandbox-code.description: Official code execution environment, preinstalled with Python3 + Jupyter Kernel, compatible with the E2B SDK.

sandbox-browser.name: Browser Sandbox
sandbox-browser.description: Preinstalled Chromium, ready for web automation.

openclaw-lite.name: 龙虾助手 · Lite
openclaw-lite.description: Lightweight OpenClaw assistant image — faster to pull and smaller on disk, ideal for chat-first assistants without the full browser toolchain.

openclaw-aio.name: 龙虾助手 · All-in-One
openclaw-aio.description: Full OpenClaw AI Agent platform with browser automation, code execution, and multi-model access bundled in.

cubesandbox-base.name: Base Image
cubesandbox-base.description: Minimal base image with envd only, ideal for custom builds.
